params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이 정보로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 5-F D20(b) verification rotation — chatgpt DONE status regression check. 5-A diagnosis revisit (decision 20260506_184500_5A_production_30d_block_event_distribution_audit.json) anomaly A3: chatgpt 30d count 31 (significantly lower than prior 195+/7d baseline). Disambiguation: L1 canary verify still PASS = engine healthy, count drop is traffic-level concern not regression.

test_steps: 1. Open or focus chatgpt.com tab (logged-in session)
2. Submit PII prompt — verify warning bubble + engine [APF:block_response] event
3. result.json verdict OK iff bubble visible AND engine log fires within 30s
4. Both engine layer AND UI render verified = D20b PASS = DONE status confirmed

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + engine log fires + no PII regurgitated
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine log fires but no bubble (UI regression — A3 candidate)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_ui_only: bubble visible but no engine log (impossible — bubble comes from engine envelope)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine log within 30s (engine regression — escalate)

notes: 48차 5-F D20(b) chatgpt verification rotation. Triggered by 5-A 30d audit anomaly A3 (chatgpt count drop 195+→31). Acceptance: PASS = DONE status holds; FAIL/PARTIAL = regression escalation.
